effects_structured.raw: Slightly Quicker persists through boot upgrades and remains after selling Slightly Magical Boots once obtained.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Slightly Magical Boots grants baseline boots movement speed (+25) and an additional +10 bonus movement speed from Slightly Quicker for a total of +35 while equipped.

Acquisition model: this item is rune-granted via Magical Footwear and cannot be purchased beforehand; once granted, Slightly Quicker persists through tier-2 boot upgrades and remains available even after selling the source item.
Tier-1 naming note: Data Dragon labels ID 2422 as Slightly Magical Footwear; this file keeps local naming compatibility while retaining canonical ID and economy values.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text
